# PHIL.087 ? Anarchism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** anarchism
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Rejection of hierarchical authority; voluntary association; mutual aid; direct action; anti-statism; horizontal organization

## Application
Reject coercive hierarchies; voluntary cooperation; mutual aid; direct action; decentralized organization; anti-authoritarianism

## Key Values
- Anti-hierarchy
- Voluntary association
- Mutual aid
- Freedom
